titleStmt.title: SII 20.152: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 152. (B.K. No. 3 of 1937-38.) AGARKHĒḌ, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab fixed into the wall of the temple of Saṅkaraliṅga.

summary.p: This record is dated in the cyclic year Vikṛita, Jyēshṭha, Amāvāsyā, Monday. The king's regnal year is not given but the cyclic year Vikṛita which fell in the reign of Sōvidēva, coincided with A.D. 1170. In this year, the details of the date correspond regularly to Monday, June 15, f.d.t. ·10.

The inscription records a gift of land to Dugga-jīya made by Daṇḍanāyaka Basavarasa, an officer of Maiḷaya-nāyaka, his brother Kopparasa, Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Vārarasa, the prabhu and gāvuṇḍas of Khēḍa, etc., out of the gift of 325 mattars of land which had been (formerly) made by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kaiḷāsarasa, a subordinate of Subhatuṅgadēva to the temple of Kaiḷāsadēva at Khēḍa, the rājadhāni of the Thirtysix-village (division) included in Tarddavāḍi-nāḍu. It also registers the gift of an oil-mill to the same temple, by Daṇḍanāyaka Basavarasa and refers to a previous gift, apparently to the same temple, made by Babbagāvuṇḍa and Lakshmādēvi on the occasion of a solar eclipse.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁ
bhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī śubhatuṁgadēva śrīpāda
padmōpajīvi śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ tarddavāḍināḍa kaiḷāsara
sarā nāḍoḷagaṇa mūvattāṟuṁbāḍada rājadhāni śrīmatu
khēḍada taṁna hesara dibyaliṁgaṁ śrīkaiḷāsēśvaradēvargge biṭṭa keyi māṇi
kēśvarada kōla mattaru mūnūṟippattaydaṟoḷage
śrīmatu kaḷacuryyacakravartti rāyamurāri sōma
dēvana sannāhaṁ makaracihnadhvajādhāra vīramaiḷeyanā
yakana mahāpasāyitaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ basavarasaruṁ taṁ
ma kopparasaruṁ śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vārarasa
ruṁ khēḍada prabhu gāvuṁḍugaḷuṁ paṁcamaṭha stāna
dācāryya pramukhavāgi duggajīyargge śrīmatu vikṛ
tasaṁvatsarada jēṣṭamāsadamāvāsye sōmavāradaṁ
du gaṁgeya keyyoḷage māṇikēsvarada kōla
ttu mattaru keyyaṁ sarvvabādhaparihāraṁ sarvvanama
gi biṭṭaru . mattavā dēvara naṁdādīvigege daṁḍanāya
kaṁ basavarasaru sarvvanamasyavāgi biṭṭa gāṇavondu .
© muṁnaṁ babbagāvuṁḍanuṁ lakṣmādēviyaruṁ sū
ryyagrahaṇadalu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi sarvvana
masyavāgi biṭṭa gāṇavoṁdu . Ā dēvasaṁtatigaḷellaruṁ
taṁtamma gāṇadalu pratyēkaṁ biṭṭeṇne saṭṭugeyondu
© śrībhīmarathi prasiddha nadi vārijavaktre taraṁgamā
ḷikākōmaḷabāhuyugme śapharākṣi ca
kravākaduddāmakucābhirāme phaṇi
ghananitaṁbe nīrajastōmasugaṁdhasārācaḷadbhramara
gaṁge puṭṭidaḷu . Iṁtoppamaṁ paḍedu śrī gaṁgā
nadige samānavenisida bhīmarathiya dharmma
maṁ pratipāḷisidavaranantapuṇyamaṁ paḍevaru vī dha
rmmamaṁ mana vacana kāyadiṁ keḍisidavaru śrībhīmarathī
nadītīradoḷerkōṭidibyatapōdhanaruma
worn out
Digital edition of SII 20.152 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
